hotel_name: Khách sạn Đại Việt (Dai Viet Hotel)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Lễ tân phục vụ rất thiếu chuyên nghiệp,. Chưa từng ở khách sạn nào kém như vậy!

reviews.title: The Gym room is very good and useful when I was in there.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was good,
reviews.negatives: The room was not cleaned enough.

reviews.title: Nhà hàng phục vụ bữa sáng
reviews.text:
- nhà hàng vệ sinh không sạch sẽ, nhiều nhặng bám vào đồ ăn.
- nhân viên nhà hàng mặt mày đăm chiêu như không muốn khách đến.

reviews.title: Lovely downtown hotel
reviews.positives: Lovely hotel close to the train station and centre of town. Room was very big and well appointed. Bathroom was good too. Buffet breakfast had lots of options.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Phòng ẩm mốc, sàn nhà ẩm mặc dù bật điều hoà. Các đồ gỗ, nhà vệ sinh ẩm mốc đen

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Central location, friendly and helpful staff, tasty breakfast
reviews.negatives: No

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located, clean, and reasonably priced. I booked on Agoda and asked the receptionist if I had registered for a higher floor. She replied that with the low-rate booking, I could only stay on lower floors, and she had a very disdainful expression. I further asked if a VAT invoice could be issued, and she told me that since I booked through Agoda, I should ask Agoda about it, while the hotel would issue it. Everything was great except for the receptionist who brought the rating down.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Spacious, clean, very tidy. Friendly staff, good breakfast. Close to the city centre and railway station.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: It's nice place and quite. Breakfast is good enough for all
reviews.positives: Nice place
reviews.negatives: The door was sometime outof battery and difficult to open

reviews.title: Dai Viet Hotel
reviews.text: I stayed at the hotel in May 2025, so this time I chose Dai Viet again. However, this experience was not good as I found my room to have a musty smell. Although the hotel staff quickly assisted me in changing to another room, I think the hotel should pay more attention to checking the rooms carefully, especially for guests who have booked in advance.
reviews.response:
Dai Viet Hotel xin chào! Rất tiếc về trải nghiệm chưa được tốt khi phòng bị ẩm mốc của Quý khách hàng. Do thời tiết những ngày gần đây chuyển nồm đột ngột, độ ẩm không khí tăng cao nên phòng có thể bị ẩm và có mùi mốc hơn bình thường.
Chúng tôi đã tiến hành khử ẩm và kiểm tra lại toàn bộ hệ thống để khắc phục tình trạng này. Rất mong Quý khách thông cảm và cho chúng tôi cơ hội phục vụ tốt hơn trong những lần tới.
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã góp ý!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice place and nice staff
reviews.negatives: Breakfast is not really good

reviews.title: Convenient and clean hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a central position, convenient for traveling.

reviews.title: Excellent Accommodation
reviews.positives: This is perhaps the best value for a hotel that I have yet found in Vietnam. Remarkable quality at a great price.

reviews.title: Clean hotel
reviews.text: The room is relatively beautiful, clean, and has a chill view of the square. It's close to the center, so getting around is very convenient.

reviews.title: Excellent

Très bon standing

Chambre spacieuse

Équipements complets
Super petit déjeuner 
Très bonne expérience
Ville intéressante et gens chaleureux 
Je reviendrai
reviews.negatives: Rien à signaler

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: Ks has a good convenient location, rooms are clean and fully equipped to meet basic needs. Friendly and enthusiastic staff.

reviews.title: Gute Wahl für Kurzaufenthalt in Thanh Hoa
reviews.positives:
Das Personal an der Reception ist freundlich und sehr hilfsbereit. Das Hotel ist zentral gelegen, die Zimmer trotz Nähe zur Strasse ruhig.
Die Zimmer sind gross, hell und sauber.
Beim Frühstück erlebten wir 2 Seiten: zum Einen war die Auswahl recht gross und das Personal hinter dem Bestellbuffet hinten recht freundlich…
reviews.negatives: zum Anderen war das Personal beim Frühstücksbuffet vorne, welches für den Empfang der eintretenden Gäste und deren Bon Kontrolle zuständig war, sehr unmotiviert, unfreundlich und eher mit sich selbst beschäftigt. Auf die Nachfrage für Nachschub von frischem Saft oder heissem Kaffee wurde nur widerwillig reagiert.

reviews.title: Good location and good value.
reviews.text: Great location, only a 9min walk to Vincom Centre. Lots of food choices and just across Co.Op.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Es lief alles reibungslos.  Von a bis z perfekt organisiert.
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Good location and good value
reviews.text: Great location, only a 9min walk to Vincom Centre. Lots of food choices and just across Co.Op.

reviews.title: Hohe Qualität, guter Preis
reviews.positives:
Ich habe Anfang März 2026 drei Tage im „Dai Viet Hotel“ gewohnt und habe mich dort sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Mitarbeiter sprechen gut Englisch, sind sehr freundlich und möchten jeden Wunsch erfüllen.
Das Zimmer 507 ist sehr groß, es wurde täglich gereinigt und das Bett ist ausgezeichnet.
Das Frühstück war vielseitig und sehr gut.
Sehr zu empfehlen!
reviews.negatives: Alles sehr gut

reviews.title: Location and Good Staff
reviews.text: Not everything was perfect but you pay for what you get. The staff react to rectify issues and are friendly.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Il dai Viet è un hotel con tutte le comodità, compresa un'ottima palestra pulita e con tutti gli attrezzi, e un parcheggio gratuito per i clienti. Colazione abbondante e buonissima. Stanza spaziosa. Ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I am quite satisfied with the service at Dai Viet; the hotel is pretty good, located right in the city center, surrounded by a walking street and Lam Son square. Across the street is Highland coffee, and there are many eateries along the street of the hotel, making it very convenient to get around.

reviews.title: Hotel Dai Viet a Thanh Hoa Simplicio the best.
reviews.positives: Tutto perfetto. Rapporto qualità prezzo eccezionale. Camera spaziosissima.Colazione a buffet fantastica. E per chi volesse al quarto piano una piccola ma completa palestra. Niente da dire, il migliore hotel che ho trovato finora nel mio viaggio tra Thailandia,Laos e Vietnam. Andate a colpo sicuro.
reviews.negatives: L'unico piccolo appunto era per una fuoriuscita di acqua dal box doccia che bagnava la zona bagno. Stanza 509.

reviews.title: Vệ sinh
reviews.text:
Tầng 4 bước ra thang máy là có mùi mốc nặng. Cả hành lang có
mùi mốc rất ảnh hưởng đến sức khoẻ. Cần được cải thiện.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
数年前の安い時を知っているので、少し割高感を感じますがベトナムの物価上昇等々を考えると致し方ないのかなぁ。と。
いずれにしても、満足でした。
reviews.negatives: 特になし。

reviews.title: Good value hotel.
reviews.text: Large room. Well equipped. Very clean. Large bathroom. Seperate shower. Let down slightly by a very hard bed.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 非常乾淨，早餐很好吃，風景非常棒

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Khách sạn không hỗ trợ xuất VAT nếu book và trả trc qua Agoda. Chia sẻ cho anh/chị em nào ở cần lấy hoá đơn đỏ VAT thì lưu ý.

reviews.title: 很好
reviews.positives: 房间很大很干净，位置靠近火车站，非常方便，前台也会英文，沟通顺畅，总体来说不错
reviews.negatives: 洗手台的下水有问题，排不掉水

reviews.title: Location is superb
reviews.text: Staff is friendly and close to Vincom Plaza.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
房间很大，早餐有越南米粉，很好吃。
有些前台员工不懂英语，需要使用翻译器，不过他们很热情的帮助我解决问题，比如预订回河内的巴士。
reviews.negatives: 房间只有橡胶拖鞋，没有其他国家的酒店使用的那种一次性拖鞋。虽然这样看比较环保，但很怕橡胶拖鞋不干净有脚气什么的，有点不适应。

reviews.title: Great roomy hotel but hard to find a smiley staff in the entire hotel
reviews.text:
Ideally located and accessible to supermarket and eating places. Room is spacious and bed makes for a good night sleep. 
While the 'hardware' is great, I can't say the same for the 'heart ware.' The staff, especially the restaurant service staff looked like they didn't want to be there. They looked really grouchy.

reviews.negatives: Phần kỹ thuât vê cấp nước nóng chưa dc ổn định. Thoát nước có phòng còn chưa tốt, gây bất tiên cho khách lưu trú. Ban quản lý nên lưu tâm viểc đảm bảo các tiện ích hoạt động tốt trước khi khách check in.

reviews.negatives: Phòng không đc sạch, cafe và trà nhưng không có đường kèm theo, bị đổi phòng sau khi checkin vì lý do là buổi tối tầng đó không hoạt động! Món ăn sáng không nhiều món. 3 sao nhưng có vẻ hơi tệ!

reviews.title: Great location and large clean rooms.
reviews.text: The hotel great if you are coming or going by train, The station  is about 500meters. The reception staff was very friendly and helpful. The room was large and clean. I did not get to try the included buffet breakfast unfortunately.

Giá còn cao.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is fine, the room is spacious, and the interior is clean. The breakfast is delicious. The downside is that the reception staff doesn't smile. They are very unfriendly and have an uncomfortable vibe.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Tiện

reviews.title: It was very good!
reviews.text:
I thought I was staying at a three-star hotel, but the size and service were of a quality above four stars. Breakfast was included in the accommodation fee, but unfortunately, I couldn't eat it as I left early in the morning. The water pressure was sufficient, and hot water was readily available, making for a comfortable stay. A bathrobe was also provided, which was very helpful.

The location was good as well, with a Co.opmart (supermarket) right in front of the hotel, and the night market was just a short walk away. It is convenient for sightseeing and shopping.

reviews.title: Khách sạn cần dạy lại cách làm việc, và đạo đức của nhân viên kiểm đồ khi khách checkout nhé.
reviews.positives: Mình hoàn toàn hài lòng về phòng nghỉ, khá sạch sẽ và thoáng. Nhân viên thì nhiệt tình, giải quyết vấn đề khá hợp lý.
reviews.negatives: Nhưng trải nghiệm checkout, nhân viên kiểm đồ thì cực tệ,vì những con sâu bỏ dầu nồi canh, trước khi ra khỏi phòng mình còn check tủ lạnh, và ko hề đưa lon pepsi nào lên ngăn đông để làm lon pepsi đó bị đông đá và phồng tướng. Và khẳng định ngăn đông không có 1 đồ vật hay lon nước nào trên đó, vậy mà lúc xuống trả phòng thì đc báo là do để lon pepsi lên ngăn đông, gây hỏng lon pepsi và cần thanh toán, cái lon pepsi nó chẳng đáng bao nhiêu, mà chơi cái trò bẩn bựa vậy thì không đáng. Khách sạn cần dạy lại cách làm việc, đạo đức của nhân viên kiểm đồ khi khách checkout nhé.

reviews.title: City Central
reviews.text: Hotel is ideally located. within 45 minutes to king Lệ loi tomb and also 45 minutes to kinh Ho citadel wall, a UNESCO heritage site. Specially within walking distance to restaurants and night market. The facility has a weight gym (free weight plus machines mixed use) Breakfast was nice.  Would stay again on our next trip. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: This is a recommended accommodation.
reviews.text:
I stayed for about a week. The accommodation has excellent value for money. I was very satisfied compared to other accommodations in Hanoi at the same price range.

Advantages:
- The room is spacious and clean.
- I liked the buffet breakfast. The restaurant was also beautiful and clean.
- It is located close to the train station, making it easy to access, and there is a large supermarket and square right next to it.
- They cleaned well every day.

Disadvantages:
- If I had to find something, I would wish the staff's expressions were a bit brighter, but this seems to be a characteristic of Vietnamese people.

reviews.title: Ổn, ngủ ngon

reviews.title: Will be back.
reviews.text: I booked 2 nights but only stayed for 1 night, I have to leave a review right away because the hotel is just great! Centrally located with spacious parking, the room is very spacious, clean, beautiful, and equipped with all amenities. The breakfast buffet this morning had chicken pho, crispy river shrimp, and Le Street sweet potato cake... very, very delicious.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng, sạch sẽ. Phòng vệ sinh sạch sẽ. Bố trí đồ trong phòng hợp lý. Gần trung tâm quảng trường.

reviews.title: I'm very satisfied^^
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the low accommodation rate, but after checking in and entering the room on the 5th floor, I quickly realized that this hotel really offers great value for money. First of all, the room was spacious and clean, which I liked, and the shower facilities were great... the water pressure was good too... the breakfast was also excellent. This is a hotel I would love to visit again. I highly recommend it^^

reviews.negatives: Có 1 số “cũ kỹ” nhất định, ví dụ trần phòng mình nom có dấu hiệu ẩm mốc. Với lại khách sạn để giấy vệ sinh sơ cua ở đâu tìm không thấy. Hết đành dùng đỡ hộp khăn giấy để trong phòng. Chỗ cắm điện hai cái đèn ngủ hơi bẩn, chắc ít lau dọn chỗ đó

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Rooms are huge and they boast even a couch. It looks a 4-star hotel, even the lobby which is so large and luxurious. Beds are extremely comfy, featuring a thick, soft enough mattress and good pillows. Breakfast included in the room rate, so many kinds of food to choose from especially Vietnamese traditional food. Both people working at the front desk and the ones devoted to housekeeping are so professional and friendly

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent quality/price ratio. Breakfast Excellent. Position close to railway station, one bus station (east) and all the banks.
reviews.negatives: Staff not speaking much English and not helpful on travel info.

reviews.title: Room suitable for the price.
reviews.text: The room is suitable for the price, clean and convenient. It may be a bit difficult to sleep for someone sensitive to noise like me because the hotel is right next to a main road. If you're a heavy sleeper like my partner, you'll sleep very easily because of the comfortable mattress and decent lighting. The hallway is clean, with a pleasant smell of coffee.

reviews.title: Nice stay, great location, nice staff, good breakfast
reviews.negatives: The bed is a bit hard for me

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: This is the best hotel in Thanh Hoa with good design and nice food. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Good hotel!
reviews.positives: Very clean and big rooms. Good location to get to and from the station. Not much around the hotel to do but we were only passing through. Nice breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Staff don’t speak very good English so you’ll need Google translate if you’re not Vietnamese.

reviews.title: Everything was perfect.
reviews.text: Everything was perfect. 2 things I would improve. Have the staff at the reception speak English. And that there will be no mold in the shower. But really it's almost meaningless because the hotel is stunning.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
A very nice and comfortable hotel. It is close to the train station. You can't hear anything of the main road from your room. The bed is very comfortable and large. The bathroom is large.  The room is also very large and you can easily sort your clothes. The laundry service is great and the laundry smells very good. Everything was clean. The staff speaks poor English but with the translator everything went smoothly. The breakfast was sufficient and varied. 
I had a very nice stay and will come back when I am in town again.

reviews.title: Everything was perfect.
reviews.text: Everything was perfect. Central location. 2 things I would have improved... That the staff at the reception will speak English. and mold in the shower. Besides who is it... Perfect.

reviews.title: Good location, good experience

reviews.title: Very kind, deluxe hotel at a great value.
reviews.text: The entrance and lobby here were impressive, and the rooms were very spacious and clean. The breakfast was abundant and delicious, with options like pho and rice porridge. I was dropped off directly in front of the entrance by a bus from Tan Hoa Airport (100,000 dong). Notably, I lost the key to my suitcase and was in a lot of trouble, but despite it being after 8 PM, they called a locksmith for me (there was a fee, but considering my level of distress, it was a trivial amount). Additionally, the next day, I needed to take a bus to Hoa Binh, and they helped me research the schedule, departure point, and phone number. It was very kind and much appreciated. Taxis can also be easily hailed right in front of the entrance. Even with these prices, it's quite a bargain considering that Vietnam has low living costs.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Great hotel , big and clean room , breakfast is good enough though not too many choice, but no problem. Good value for money and can match 4 stars not 3 stars hotel.

reviews.title: Good place to stay

reviews.response: Chào bạn! rất tiếc về trải nghiệm chưa hài lòng của bạn. Hiện tại về hoá đơn, quý khách vui lòng liên hệ agoda để chúng tôi gửi hoá đơn, tránh trường hợp tranh chấp không đáng có, rất mong được sự thông cảm và đánh giá công bằng từ phía bạn. Trân trọng!
